task_description: Run 10 iterative Review-Debug-Fix-Optimize loops on the Augur project. Each loop reviews code/templates/tests/docs, finds issues, fixes them, verifies with tests, and commits to main. Progressive depth: Loops 1-3 obvious bugs, Loops 4-6 logic/edge cases/UX, Loops 7-9 polish/tests/docs, Loop 10 final verification + version bump to 6.1.0.
